headline: A Look At Federal Realty (FRT) Valuation After Recent Mixed Return Performance
summary: Recent performance snapshot Federal Realty Investment Trust (FRT) has drawn fresh attention after a period of mixed returns, with a slight negative move over the past month, a gain in the past 3 months, and a positive 1 year total return. See our latest analysis for Federal Realty Investment Trust. Recent trading suggests steady but moderating momentum, with a 90 day share price return of 5.32% and a year to date share price return of 8.13%. The 1 year total shareholder return of 34.02%...

headline: Macerich Stock Rises 16.4% in 6 Months: Will the Trend Last?
summary: MAC stock jumps 16.4% in six months, driven by strong leasing, redevelopment and capital recycling. Can this momentum continue?

headline: Boomers and Retirees Are Sticking With 5 of the Highest-Yielding Dividend Kings
summary: Depending on who you ask, there is a chance we will get no interest rate cuts in 2026, or if we do, it’ll be just one. Inflation fueled by higher energy costs, tariffs, and a host of other factors could be the reason the Federal Reserve cites for not lowering rates until those rising costs ... Boomers and Retirees Are Sticking With 5 of the Highest-Yielding Dividend Kings
